interviewProcess: Online Assessment (OA) / Technical Phone Screen (typically 1-2 rounds focusing on Data Structures and Algorithms)
Onsite Interview (Multiple rounds which typically include 1-2 Data Structures and Algorithms rounds, 1 System Design round, and 1 Behavioral/Leadership Principles round)
systemDesignTopics: Design a News Feed (e.g., Facebook/Instagram Feed)
behavioralQuestions: Tell me about a time you faced a significant challenge and how you overcame it.
Why Meta and why this role?
Describe a time when you failed and what you learned from it.
How do you handle conflict or disagreement with a teammate?
Tell me about a project you're most proud of.
